project.description: An orchestration layer for AI coding assistants (currently Claude Code) that enforces consistency, reliability, and more predictable outputs through a marketplace of development standards, automation tools, and AI-assisted workflows.

default.responsibility: Root orchestration module that provides the marketplace manifest, Pyprojectx build wrapper, and project-wide configuration for all child bundles.
default.purpose_reasoning: Marketplace root with 8 child bundles, no direct source code, coordinates build

marketplace.description: Top-level marketplace directory with master configuration and adapter system for multi-assistant export

test.description: Python pytest test suite for all marketplace scripts with per-bundle test directories

default.skills_by_profile_reasoning: Root module uses plan-marshall-plugin-dev domain, no integration tests or benchmarks

documentation.responsibility: Project-level documentation including build structure and workflow verification guides.
documentation.responsibility_reasoning: Inferred from doc/ directory containing build-structure.adoc and workflow-verification.adoc
documentation.purpose_reasoning: Contains only .adoc documentation files, no source code

doc.description: Project-level AsciiDoc documentation covering build structure and workflow verification guides

documentation.skills_by_profile_reasoning: Documentation-only module, uses documentation domain with single profile

plan-marshall.responsibility: Core bundle providing the 6-phase plan lifecycle (init through finalize), task execution, permission management, architecture analysis, git/CI integration, and cross-cutting utilities like script execution and TOON format support.
plan-marshall.responsibility_reasoning: From README.md and package listing showing 37 skills, 8 agents, 2 commands spanning workflow phases, data management, and integration
plan-marshall.purpose_reasoning: Provides workflow skills and agents consumed by other bundles and user commands, no standalone runtime

skill:phase-1-init.description: Plan initialization phase creating directory structure, request.md, references, and status files

skill:task-implementation.description: Domain-agnostic task execution engine with two-tier skill loading and profile-based executor routing

skill:tools-script-executor.description: Executor generator that discovers marketplace scripts and creates the execute-script.py proxy with embedded notation-to-path mappings

skill:extension-api.description: Extension API for domain bundle discovery, module detection, and canonical build command generation

plan-marshall.skills_by_profile_reasoning: Core bundle uses plan-marshall-plugin-dev domain for all profiles

Includes 9 autonomous agents for implementation, testing, refactoring, and build fixing.
